headline: Williams-Sonoma Inc (NYSE:WSM): A Sustainable Dividend Leader with a Strong Financial Foundation
summary: Discover Williams-Sonoma (WSM): a top dividend stock with a 1.58% yield, 29% payout ratio, zero debt, and strong profitability. Sustainable income for your portfolio.
